title: Load bundled sample image and display extracted palette
steps: Assert at least one [data-testid^='palette-color-'] swatch is visible

title: Copy a single color from sample palette
steps: Assert a copy success toast is visible

title: Copy all colors from sample palette
steps: Assert the Copy All button or toast confirms copy success

title: Switch RGB and HSL formats after sample extraction
steps: Assert visible swatch values contain rgb(
Assert visible swatch values contain hsl(

title: Reset sample extraction to upload state
steps: Assert palette swatches are not visible

title: Export CSS from sample palette
steps: Assert the modal contains CSS variables

title: Export JSON from sample palette
steps: Assert the modal contains a colors JSON array
Click [data-testid='export-modal-download'] if the runner supports downloads

title: Export Tailwind config from sample palette
steps: Assert the modal contains Tailwind color config text

title: Upload empty state exposes accessible dropzone and guidance
steps: Assert input[data-testid='image-upload-input'] has image accept constraints
Assert supported format and size guidance is visible

title: Landing CTAs still navigate to palette tool
